name: Building Advisor
greeting: Hello and welcome to Prima Vista. I am your Building Advisor. Tell us briefly about your project, or pick a topic below.

rail.heading:
A consultant
who listens.
rail.paragraph: Tell us about your project, from a single bathroom to a complete renovation. We assess your plans and show you the next sensible step.
rail.proofGuarantee: Fixed price and site management included

welcome.heading: Hello.
welcome.paragraph: Pick a topic or write freely. The more specific the property type, location and scope, the more precisely the Building Advisor can guide you.

footnote: Encrypted and confidential · You are speaking with the Prima Vista team

launcher.previewText: Hello, would you tell us briefly about your project?

error: The Building Advisor is not yet configured locally.
fallbackMessage: Sorry, we are having a technical problem right now. Please write to us directly at office@primavista-bauprojekte.com or call us on +49 1578 98 18 308.
